targets.rawSql:
WITH decisions AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, max(observed_at) AS last_observed_at, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes, count() AS decisions, avg(source_ok) AS source_ok_rate, avg(orderbook_ok) AS orderbook_ok_rate, avg(risk_ok) AS risk_ok_rate, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') AS blockers
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), signals AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, count() AS signals, max(live_order_allowed OR mode = 'live') AS live_allowed
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), metrics AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, sum(trade_count) AS trades, sum(skip_count) AS skips, sum(decision_count) AS metric_decisions, sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS skip_rate, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc, avg(roi) AS roi, sum(exposure_usdc) AS exposure_usdc
  FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  decisions.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(decisions.last_observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)`,
  decisions.age_minutes AS `Âge minutes`,
  ifNull(signals.signals, 0) AS `Signaux`,
  decisions.decisions AS `Décisions`,
  ifNull(metrics.trades, 0) AS `Trades`,
  ifNull(metrics.skip_rate, 0) AS `Taux de skip`,
  decisions.source_ok_rate AS `Taux source OK`,
  decisions.orderbook_ok_rate AS `Taux carnet OK`,
  decisions.risk_ok_rate AS `Taux risque OK`,
  decisions.blockers AS `Blocages`,
  ifNull(signals.live_allowed, 0) AS `Préparation live`,
  ifNull(metrics.net_pnl_usdc, 0) AS `PnL net`,
  ifNull(metrics.roi, 0) AS `ROI`,
  ifNull(metrics.exposure_usdc, 0) AS `Exposition`,
  multiIf(decisions.age_minutes > 60, 'DONNEES_OBSOLETES', ifNull(signals.signals, 0) = 0, 'AUCUN_SIGNAL_RECENT', decisions.risk_ok_rate < 0.8, 'RISQUE_BLOQUE', decisions.source_ok_rate < 0.8, 'SOURCE_BLOQUEE', decisions.orderbook_ok_rate < 0.8, 'CARNET_BLOQUE', decisions.blockers > 0, 'BLOQUE', ifNull(signals.live_allowed, 0), 'LIVE_ACTIF', ifNull(metrics.trades, 0) = 0 AND ifNull(signals.signals, 0) > 0, 'PAPER_SEUL', 'OK') AS `Statut attentes`
FROM decisions
LEFT JOIN signals ON decisions.strategy_id = signals.strategy_id
LEFT JOIN metrics ON decisions.strategy_id = metrics.strategy_id
ORDER BY `Statut attentes`, `Âge minutes` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(max(observed_at), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)`, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS `Âge minutes` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics GROUP BY strategy_id HAVING `Âge minutes` > 60 ORDER BY `Âge minutes` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, countIf(NOT source_ok) AS `Source KO`, countIf(NOT orderbook_ok) AS `Orderbook KO`, countIf(NOT risk_ok) AS `Risk KO`, count() AS `Décisions` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY (`Source KO` + `Orderbook KO` + `Risk KO`) DESC

panels.title: Stratégies bloquées par source / carnet / risque

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, sum(m.decision_count) AS `Décisions attendues/observées`, ifNull(s.signals, 0) AS `Signaux`, multiIf(ifNull(s.signals, 0) = 0, 'AUCUN_SIGNAL_RECENT', sum(m.decision_count) = 0, 'PAS_DE_DONNEES', 'OK') AS `Écart attentes / activité` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics m LEFT JOIN (SELECT strategy_id, count() AS signals FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id) s ON m.strategy_id = s.strategy_id WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) GROUP BY m.strategy_id, s.signals ORDER BY `Écart attentes / activité`

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, max(live_order_allowed) AS `Live autorisé`, countIf(mode = 'live') AS `Événements live`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(max(observed_at), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)` FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY `Événements live` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, avg(risk_ok) AS `Taux risque OK`, countIf(NOT risk_ok) AS `Blocages risque`, anyLast(raw) AS `Dernier brut` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY `Blocages risque` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, if(enabled, 'ACTIVEE', 'DESACTIVEE') AS `État activation`, mode AS `Mode configuré`, if(allow_live, 'LIVE_AUTORISE', 'LIVE_INTERDIT') AS `Garde-fou live`, settings AS `Configuration`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière config (Paris)` FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs FINAL WHERE match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}') ORDER BY `État activation`, strategy_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run / exécution
